bugsletter.title: Asumi Bugsletter
bugsletter.description:
Hey there! You're invited to our mailing list ✨

Monthly emails with Asumi updates: Steam, demo, beta testing and events!

If that sounds interesting, sign up below 🦉 you can unsubscribe anytime.
bugsletter.confirmationNotice: We'll send you a confirmation email.
